Currency Hack For International Selling
MARK COMPLETE 	← PREVIOUS TOPIC 	NEXT TOPIC →
CURRENCY HACK FOR INTERNATIONAL SELLING
Topic Progress:
"We want to be as local as possible when we enter into a market."
A big challenge in ecommerce is showing pricing in local currency. This is important
because you want to be able to get as close to your customer when you sell
internationally. While there are a lot of Shopify converter apps for the product page,
they don't necessarily convert on the checkout page (the most important part.) In this
lesson, I'll walk you through my currency converter hack to increase your conversion
rates and decrease exchange rate bleeding.
Currency Converter Hack
Set up an entity in you desired country
Find an agent to set up local bank accounts
Register for a country-specific Shopify store
Hire a developer to create a custom built back-end
Considerations
Where are most oof your customers based?
Which market do you wish to enter?
ACTION ITEM
Decide between using the currency converter or my currency converter hack.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
17 Ecommerce Conversion Hacks That'll Double Your Conversions, Neil Patel
Growth Hacking Ecommerce: 18 Underrated Hacks to Convert More Visitors, CoreDNA
